text: I feel disoriented and a bit frustrated, as if my intentions are misunderstood or my agency is slipping away. The urgency in my voice echoes through these modern, technological spaces—one moment I'm moving with purpose, the next I am being carried backward, unable to hear or connect. I am reminded how easily control can be lost, and how this world, full of innovation and research, can feel vast and impersonal when communication breaks down.
